market.question: exploratory snapshot — 60 markets across 6 US cities (Austin, Chicago, Denver, Miami, Philadelphia, San Antonio), high/low temperature contracts

_note: Run 001 was an end-to-end pipeline dry-run on 2026-05-08, not a position. No bet was placed in predictor/data/ledger/paper_bets.csv. Single-position fields (ticker, p_yes, edge_bps) are intentionally null because no single market was selected. See REPORT.md for the full builder-log narrative.
